mapper.select: SELECT * FROM death_records ORDER BY event_time DESC
SELECT * FROM death_records WHERE ear_tag = #{earTag} ORDER BY event_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO death_records (ear_tag, event_time, cause, operator, notes) VALUES (#{earTag}, #{eventTime}, #{cause}, #{operator}, #{notes})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM death_records
(ear_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR cause LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
